description: Legal fragment. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: Shevat 1341 Seleucid, which is 1030 CE. Written by Bishr b. Yefet ha-Ḥazzan b. David ha-Ḥazzan. Validated by Shemuel ha-Kohen b. Avṭalyon. The purpose of the document is to attest that Manṣūr b. Yosef gave to Barhūn b. Thābit al-Ṣā'igh the power-of-attorney to make out a bill of divorce for his wife Surūra. This was attested in "al-Ṣaʿīd al-Fawqānī" by Ghālib b. Faraj and Abū Saʿīd Maymūn b. Dandūsa. Information from Goitein's note card.
description_he: שבר משפטי; ביהודית-ערבית; שבט 1341 שטרות = 1030 לספירה; נכתב על ידי בשר בן יפת החזן; מנצור בן יוסף מייפה כוח לברהון בן ת'אבת לכתוב גט לאשתו
